scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock'].forEach((file)=>fs.rmSync(file,{force:true})); const userAgent=process.env.npm_config_user_agent || ''; if(!userAgent.startsWith('pnpm/')){console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1);}"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
